scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server -c blue,green "npm run dev -w client" "npm run dev -w server"
scripts.dev:mock: concurrently -n client,server,mock -c blue,green,yellow "npm run dev -w client" "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w mock-transcript"
scripts.build: npm run db:generate -w server && npm run build -w client && npm run build -w server
